headline: Ryan Cohen Plans Aggressive Push to Buy eBay. GameStop’s Balance Sheet Says He Has the Firepower to Make It Happen.
summary: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen wants to buy eBay for $125/share despite board rejection. Here's what GME's balance sheet tells us about whether this deal can actually happen.

headline: GameStop CEO Questions eBay’s $2.4 Billion Marketing Spend
summary: Ryan Cohen questioned eBay's $2.4B marketing budget as the company began recruiting a Marketing Effectiveness lead in Toronto.
